summary: Lead accepts M7-AUDIO-ART-LOCALIZATION-COMPLETE-001 after replacement client_engineer writer completion, independent historical_researcher ACCEPT, and lead integration gates. Acceptance is limited to Beta audio/art/localization coverage evidence for content-lock preparation; it is not formal content lock acceptance, does not approve culture-specific production assets, and preserves DEFER_MANUAL_NODE_BATTLE.

decisions: Accepted only after independent historical_researcher ACCEPT.
The manifest remains content-lock preparation evidence; formal content lock acceptance remains a future Human Gate.
Culture-specific assets, language quality, sensitive names/titles/transliterations, symbols, sacred imagery/audio, and period music remain review/Human Gate material.
Static-resource boundary remains enforced: no paid service, remote pipeline, secrets, telemetry, CDN/release commitment, cloud/account/server/multiplayer, or new production dependency.
Unrelated docs/M7_UI_Localization_Art_Handoff_Prompts.md remains untracked and out of scope.
risks: Formal content lock Human Gate remains ahead and must not infer acceptance from this task.
Static neutral asset slots are evidence, not production cultural assets.
Future standalone validation of the new coverage manifest may need content-tools integration if the manifest becomes authoritative content rather than client evidence.
requested_action: Open PR, wait for CI, merge to main, mark CLOSED only after origin/main integration, then continue to next dependency-ready M7 task.
